notes.iv: Item Value = sum of material @itemvalue x count (ao-bin-dumps). Station fee = iv x 0.1125 x (fee per 100 nutrition) / 100. Missing = a material has no @itemvalue; app shows fee n/a.
notes.bc: city whose +15% crafting specialty covers this item's @craftingcategory. Missing = no specialty (royal/faction/crystal-league sets).
notes.fc: base crafting focus (@craftingfocus) of THIS market key's own recipe (gear @N = the enchantment-N node, each level has its own focus). Missing = no @craftingfocus on the node; app shows focus n/a.
notes.ur: [resource id, count] to ENCHANT up to this key from the level below (<upgraderequirements>): runes/souls/relics only, no silver, no focus, quality preserved. Only on @1..@3 - x.3 to x.4 has no upgrade path, x.4 is craft-only.
notes.source: ao-bin-dumps + scripts/data/bonus_cities.json; rebuild on game patch only
notes.extra: refined + food + potion iv/bc merged by build_craft_extra.py
